name: Clone
description:
Changes the package name and the app name. This allows you to install the patched app alongside the original Instagram app.
Caution: Do not select the official Morphe's "Change package name" universal patch.

options.title: Package name
options.description: A new package name for the patched app.

options.title: App name
options.description: A new app name (label). Entering "Instagram" will skip changing the app name.

name: Disable Reels scrolling
description: Disables the endless scrolling behavior in Instagram Reels, preventing swiping to the next Reel. Note: On a clean install, the 'Tip' animation may appear but will stop on its own after a few seconds.

name: Disable story auto flipping
description: Disable stories automatically flipping/skipping after some seconds.

name: Hide all stories
description:
Hides all stories from the tray in the feed page.
You may need to clean app data after the initial use of this patch to see its effects.

name: Hide explore feed
description: Hides posts and reels from the explore/search page.

name: Hide feed content
description: Hide the feed content, leaving only stories in the home page.

name: Hide navigation buttons
description: Hides navigation bar buttons, such as the Reels and Create button. Choose what button to hide using the patch options.

options.title: Hide Home
options.description: Permanently hides the Home button. App starts at next available tab.

name: Hide notes tray
description: Hides the notes tray from the direct tab.

name: Hide reshare button
description: Hides the reshare button from both posts and reels.

name: Hide suggested content
description: Choose the suggested content to hide using the patch options.

options.title: Hide suggested reels
options.description: Hides suggested reels from feed and reels tab.

options.title: Hide suggested stories
options.description: Hides suggested stories/users from story tray.

options.title: Hide highlights in stories
options.description: Hides highlighted stories from story tray, sponsored stories which have no set expiration.

options.title: Hide suggested accounts
options.description: Hides suggested accounts from the list of followers and from other profiles.

name: Hide Threads profile button
description: Hides the Threads button from the profile page action bar (top right of the profile page).

name: Limit feed to following profiles
description: Filters the home feed to display only content from profiles you follow.

name: Remove build expired popup
description: Removes the popup that appears after a while, when the app version ages.

name: Unlock Premium features
description: Unlock Premium features. You have to be logged in with an account.

name: Unlock Premium features
description: Unlock Premium features. Some features are not possible to patch (server sided), such as saving a multi-days hike.

name: Unlock Pro features
description: Unlock Pro features (park4night +). You have to be logged in with an account.
